## 前置讲义摘要（你必须基于这些已建立的认知继续，不要重复，要承接）

### u1-l1 项目定位与设计哲学

本讲为手册起点，定位 pulp-platform/axi：一个用 SystemVerilog 编写、遵循 AXI4 / AXI4-Lite 的片上通信网络 IP 库，既给拼搭网络的积木，也自带端点（DMA、存储控制器）与验证组件。核心哲学是「组合优于配置」——把 Unix 哲学搬进硬件，宁可把职责单一的小模块背靠背串起来，也不靠堆参数；axi_xbar 本身就是 unmuxed（demux 阵列）加 axi_mux 阵列拼成，是其活样本。引入术语：Master/Slave 主从、片上互联、五通道 valid/ready 握手、in flight（在途）与 pending（挂起）、AXI4+ATOPs（AXI4 叠加 AXI5 原子操作）。ATOP_R_RESP 位的原子写会同时产生 B 和 R 响应，不支持 ATOP 的从端前须加 axi_atop_filter。模块可按互连 / 转换 / 端点 / 验证四类建立心智地图。关键结论：xbar 的 master 端口 ID 比 slave 端口宽 ⌈log2(NoSlvPorts)⌉ 位，用于路由响应。本讲不要求懂协议细节。
### u1-l2 仓库结构与构建系统

本讲讲解 `pulp-platform/axi` 仓库的组织与构建，不涉及 AXI 协议细节。仓库按职责分目录：`src/` 放可综合 RTL，`include/axi/` 放 `.svh` 宏文件，`test/` 放 `tb_*.sv` 测试台，`doc/` 与 `scripts/` 分别存放文档和构建脚本。核心概念是 **Level 0–6 编译层级**：由于被 `import` 的 `package` 必须先编译，本库把依赖关系做拓扑分层，一个文件的层级等于其在本包内最长依赖链加一，按层级升序即可保证正确编译。其中 `axi_pkg.sv` 作为全库共享类型的 `package`，被几乎所有模块引用且无内部依赖，因此位于 Level 0，是依赖图的根。仓库并行维护 `Bender.yml`、`axi.core`、`src_files.yml` 三份层级清单，仅为兼容 Bender、FuseSoC 与朴素脚本三类工具链；`ips_list.yml` 则是钉死外部依赖 commit 的发布清单。验证专用文件（`axi_test` 等）不可综合，三份清单均将其单独隔离。`include/` 通过 Bender 的 `export_include_dirs` 导出，使下游可直接 `\`include "axi/typedef.svh"`。后续讲义将承接 `axi_pkg` 中的类型定义回顾协议，并拆解 `Makefile` 与脚本的实际用法。
### u1-l3 AXI4 协议快速回顾

本讲从「SystemVerilog 如何表达 AXI4」的视角回顾协议，为阅读 axi_demux、axi_mux、axi_xbar 打地基，核心源码是全库协议字典 axi_pkg.sv 与 axi_intf.sv（AXI_BUS 接口及其 Master/Slave/Monitor modport）。最小模块有四：五通道与数据流方向——写事务用 AW/W/B、读事务用 AR/R，AW/W/AR 由 Master 发、B/R 由 Slave 发，方向在 modport 的 input/output 中明确；valid/ready 握手——同一时钟沿两者同高才算一次握手（beat），valid 一旦拉高在握手前不可撤，并区分 in flight（事务级，地址拍已握手而响应未握手，即 outstanding 并发）与 pending（拍级，valid 高 ready 低）两个术语；突发类型 BURST_FIXED/INCR/WRAP（2'b00/01/10），INCR 地址每拍加 2^size，WRAP 长度限 2/4/8/16 且回卷，len=拍数−1 最多 256 拍；响应码 RESP_OKAY/EXOKAY/SLVERR/DECERR（2'b00/01/10/11），本库 resp_precedence 规定合并优先级 DECERR>SLVERR>OKAY>EXOKAY。关键术语：事务、beat、五通道、握手、in flight、pending、突发、len/size/burst、resp_precedence，后续讲义将直接承接。
### u1-l4 如何编译、仿真与综合

本讲承接「仓库结构与构建系统」，把 Level 0–6 编译层级落到可执行操作，讲解如何用一条 `make` 命令完成编译、仿真、综合，不涉及 AXI 协议细节或任何 RTL 修改。最小模块包括：`Makefile`（总指挥，把三大动作包装成 `compile.log`/`sim-<tb>.log`/`elab.log` 文件目标，并以日志内容而非返回码判成败）、`scripts/compile_vsim.sh`（用 `bender script vsim -t test -t rtl` 生成按 Level 0–6 排序的编译脚本，仅对全库根基 `axi_pkg` 开启 `-lint -pedanticerrors`）、`scripts/run_vsim.sh`（围绕多 `sv_seed` 种子的定向随机回归）、`scripts/run_verilator.sh`（Verilator lint）与 `scripts/synth.sh`（Synopsys DC elaborate），后两者都针对综合用例 `axi_synth_bench`。核心结论有三：一是仓库用日志内容当通过判据——脚本层 `grep "Errors: 0,"` 判仿真器无错，Makefile 层 `grep "Error:"`/`"Fatal:"` 兜底；二是测试台遵循 `tb_<dut>.sv` 命名约定，`make sim-<dut>.log` 只跑指定 TB；三是 `axi_synth_bench` 用 `for` 循环一次性实例化大量宽度/参数配置，让 elaborate 快速回归可综合性。引入的关键术语：Bender target（rtl/test/simulation/synthesis/synth_test）、`sv_seed` 随机种子、`Errors: 0` 统计行、directed random verification（定向随机验证）与回归（regression）、综合 elaborate 与 lint，以及 DUT/TB 概念——这些为后续讲义拆解 `axi_pkg`/`axi_intf` 及手写测试台提供方法学基础。
### u2-l1 axi_pkg：类型与常量

本讲精读 `axi_pkg`——全库唯一的 `package`，位于编译层级 Level 0，不依赖任何人却被几乎所有模块 `import`，是类型与常量的单一事实来源。覆盖四个模块：（1）包的组织与两种等价用法：通配导入 `import axi_pkg::*;` 与作用域引用 `axi_pkg::resp_t`；（2）「宽度常量 parameter ↔ typedef」成对模式，11 个 `XxxWidth` 对应 10 个 `xxx_t`（`LockWidth` 无 typedef），宽度常量还被 `aw_width` 等通道函数相加复用；（3）`CACHE_*` 是四个可按位或的位标志（异于 `BURST_*` 互斥枚举），`mem_type_t` 为常见组合命名，`get_arcache`/`get_awcache` 翻译为 AR/AW 两侧可能不同的 cache 值；（4）`atop_t`（6 位）按 `[5:4]` 大类、`[3]` 端序、`[2:0]` 算子三段编码 AXI5 原子操作，`ATOP_R_RESP` 为位下标 5，判别是否产生读响应。关键术语：宽度常量、typedef、localparam、作用域、位标志、`atop_t`/`ATOP_R_RESP`；辅助函数与配置结构体留待 u2-l2。
### u2-l2 axi_pkg：辅助函数与配置结构体

本讲精读 `axi_pkg` 的后半部分——辅助函数区与配置结构体区，承接 u2-l1 的「宽度常量 ↔ typedef」配对。函数区是全库共享的「算术大脑」，被 `axi_demux`、`axi_dw_downsizer`、`axi_test` 复用：一是突发地址与字节范围函数 `num_bytes`（每拍 2^size 字节）、`aligned_addr`（清低 size 位）、`wrap_boundary`、`beat_addr`（INCR 线性推进、WRAP 越界回卷）及 `beat_lower_byte`/`beat_upper_byte`（供 wstrb 生成）；二是 cache 位解码 `bufferable`/`modifiable`、响应优先级 `resp_precedence`（库约定 DECERR > SLVERR > OKAY > EXOKAY）、通道净荷宽度族 `aw_width`/…/`req_width`/`rsp_width`——其中 `aw_width` 比 `ar_width` 多一个 `AtopWidth`，因为原子操作编码只挂在写地址上。配置结构体区服务 `axi_xbar`：`xbar_latency_e` 用 10 个单热点位掩码（DemuxAw..MuxR）编码在哪插 spill 寄存器，文档推荐 `CUT_ALL_AX` 且 `FallThrough=0`，互连两个 xbar 须用 `CUT_*_PORTS` 以免成环；`xbar_cfg_t` 把十几个参数打包成按字段名赋值的 struct，master 端口 ID 宽度自动为 `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts + $clog2(NoSlvPorts)`；`xbar_rule_64_t`/`xbar_rule_32_t` 定义前闭后开、高位优先的地址映射规则。本讲建立的关键术语——净荷宽度、spill 寄存器、配置结构体、LatencyMode——供后续 u2-l3（接口）、u2-l4（typedef/port 宏体系）承接。
### u2-l3 axi_intf：SystemVerilog 接口

本讲围绕 `src/axi_intf.sv`，讲清 SystemVerilog 的 `interface` 与 `modport`：将 AXI4 五通道（AW/W/B/AR/R）约 43 根信号打包成一个 bundle，并用 `Master`/`Slave`/`Monitor` 三个 modport 预设方向，消除裸端口列表的冗长与连错风险。`AXI_BUS` 是不带时钟、可综合的基础接口，`Master` 与 `Slave` 方向逐根对调，`Monitor` 把所有信号设为只读。`AXI_BUS_DV` 仅多一个 `clk_i` 端口，从而能挂 `assert property` 协议断言——`pending` 期间载荷与 `valid` 须保持稳定、突发不得跨 4 KiB 页，专供仿真、不可综合。引入术语：bundle、modport 视角、`in flight`（在途，地址已握而响应未握）/`pending`（挂起，valid 高而 ready 低）、精简的 `AXI_LITE`/`AXI_LITE_DV`、以及用结构体数组配 `wptr`/`rptr` 的 `AXI_BUS_ASYNC_GRAY` 等 CDC 变体。核心准则：一次握手须 `valid` 与 `ready` 同高才算发生；测试台典型三明治为「带时钟 DV ↔ 无时钟 `AXI_BUS` ↔ 可综合 DUT」，层间用 `AXI_ASSIGN` 互连，承接 u2-l1 的 `axi_pkg` 类型，并为 u2-l4 的 typedef/assign/port 宏体系与 u3 的 driver 验证铺路。
### u2-l4 typedef / assign / port 宏体系

本讲梳理 axi 库的三个头文件宏体系，核心是「用三种等价风格表达同一组约 43 根 AXI 信号」：① `AXI_BUS` 接口（扁平 `aw_id`，带 modport 方向保护，适合对外端口）；② `req_t`/`resp_t` 结构体（嵌套 `aw.id`，可参数化、可数组，适合内核 datapath）；③ 扁平端口（`m_axi_x_awid`，服务 Vivado IP Integrator）。`typedef.svh` 的 `AXI_TYPEDEF_*` 宏按「先定基础位宽类型 → 调宏声明五个通道结构体 → 打包成 req/resp」的流程生成类型，关键划分是 req_t 装请求方驱动信号（AW/W/AR 载荷+valid、B/R ready），resp_t 装响应方驱动信号；AW 通道含 `atop` 而 AR 不含，是后续原子操作的基础。`assign.svh` 靠「分隔符戏法」（`_` 给接口、`.` 给结构体）让同一份字段清单同时服务两种命名，用户宏按 `FROM/TO` × `REQ/RESP` × `SET/ASSIGN` 组合命名。`port.svh` 的 `AXI_M_PORT`/`AXI_S_PORT` 生成扁平端口，由 `assign.svh` 的 `*_TO_FLAT` 宏与结构体连接。范本 `axi_xbar_intf` 展示「接口外壳 + 结构体内核」标准结构：内核只面对 req_t/resp_t。
### u3-l1 axi_test：底层驱动

本讲剖析 `axi_test` 包中的两个**底层逐拍驱动器**类：`axi_lite_driver` 与 `axi_driver`，它们把「在一个 AXI 通道上完成一次合法握手」封装成 `send_aw`/`recv_b` 等 task，免去手写握手与清零。核心机制是**虚接口（virtual interface）绑定**：`new()` 只保存 `AXI_LITE_DV`/`AXI_BUS_DV` 句柄，`reset_master()`/`reset_slave()` 严格按 modport 方向清零本侧输出。时序灵魂是两个参数：**TA（application time）**用 `<= #TA` 在沿后延迟施加激励（模拟 clock-to-Q），**TT（test time）**用 `#TT` 在沿后延迟采样输入（满足 setup/hold），约定 `0≤TA<TT<T_clk`。每个通道提供对称的 `send_*`（驱动 valid 逐拍等 ready，满足「valid 不撤」铁律）与 `recv_*`（驱动 ready 等 valid 后采样载荷）。`axi_driver` 改用 **beat 对象**（`axi_ax_beat` 等）承载 AXI4 十几根信号，其中 `rand` 字段为后续随机化奠基；另增 `mon_*` 被动监听任务，不驱动信号、只旁观 `valid && ready`，供 scoreboard 使用。最小范式为 `reset_*` → `send_aw/send_w` → `recv_b`（写）或 `send_ar` → `recv_r`（读）。
### u3-l2 随机主从、scoreboard 与 sim_mem

本讲承接 u3-l1 的底层 driver，把验证组件抬到「受约束随机激励 + 黄金模型自检」这一层，覆盖 axi_test 包内四个核心类与一个仿真专用模块。axi_rand_master 是自动生成合法事务的主端类，内部包装 axi_driver，靠「在途计数 + 信号量」三重约束——地址限区间且突发不跨 4 KiB 页（new_rand_burst 重抽）、并发受 MAX_READ_TXNS/MAX_WRITE_TXNS 软件反压（send_ars 的 while 等待）、ID 经 legalize_id/id_is_legal 保证合法与同 ID 保序；run() 用 fork 启动读写各管各的 6 进程。axi_rand_slave 与 axi_lite_rand_* 是镜像随机从端，MAPPED 模式靠 memory_q 关联数组实现写后读一致，Lite 主端额外提供定向 write()/read()。axi_sim_mem 是仿真专用无限忠实存储，按字节建表、可用 rerr/werr 注入错误（resp_precedence 合并）、可配未初始化字节策略与下一拍 monitor 输出，但不支持 ATOP。axi_scoreboard 是旁路监听的黄金模型，挂 master 侧，用 AW/W 维护「字节地址→字节栈」memory_q、用 AR/R 比对，靠 8'hxx 通配容忍合法不确定，ReadCheck/BRespCheck/RRespCheck 三类检查可独立开关。四者构成 rand_master→DUT→axi_sim_mem 配 AXI_ASSIGN_MONITOR 的标准自检拓扑，是全库 tb_*.sv 共同骨架。
### u3-l3 编写并运行一个测试台

本讲以 `test/tb_axi_lite_regs.sv` 为范本，讲解如何把驱动器（u3-l1）、随机主从与 scoreboard（u3-l2）拼装成一台完整的「定向随机验证」机器。核心结论：一个完整测试台（TB）由四类并发块构成——时钟复位发生器、激励发生器、自检器（checker）和停止控制。时序三参数 `CyclTime(10ns)`、`ApplTime(2ns)`、`TestTime(8ns)` 满足 0<TA<TT<T_clk，分别决定时钟周期、施加激励时刻（TA）与采样时刻（TT），后者留 setup 余量避免采到毛刺。接线采用「双接口三明治」：驱动器操作带时钟的 `AXI_LITE_DV`，DUT 用可综合的 `AXI_LITE`，两者用 `AXI_LITE_ASSIGN` 宏桥接。激励分定向段（`write()/read()` + 立即 `assert`）与随机段（`run(n_reads,n_writes)` 内部五路 `fork...join` 并发）。自检靠并发 checker 进程（用队列存期望、用 `!==` 容忍 `x` 不确定位）叠加 `assert property` 协议断言；`end_of_sim` 信号协调软停，排空若干拍后 `$stop`。参数化 TB 把事务量与 DUT 配置做成 `parameter`，命令行 `-g` 覆盖，`run_vsim.sh` 循环拼出配置矩阵，以日志 `Errors: 0,` 判成败。综合实践要求为纯透传的 `axi_lite_join` 写最小 TB，需两套三明治（主端 + 随机从端，且从端 `run()` 必须 `join_none` 分离），预期无错通过。
### u4-l1 axi_join / axi_cut / axi_multicut

本讲讲解 AXI 三个最简单的连接原语。axi_join 是纯连线，仅一句 AXI_ASSIGN 宏把两端 AXI_BUS 接口同名信号逐根直连，零逻辑零延迟，只有接口版、无结构体版。axi_cut 为 AW/W/B/AR/R 五通道各插一级 spill_register（来自外部 common_cells），切断输入到输出的所有组合路径以换取时序裕量，代价是延迟与少量面积，并支持 per-channel 的 Bypass 开关（置 1 退化为连线）。引入的核心术语为「组合路径」「切断组合路径」「用延迟/面积换时序」。axi_multicut 用 generate 循环串联 NoCuts 个 axi_cut 缓解长总线时序；NoCuts=0 退化为 join、NoCuts=1 等价单个 cut，内部 Bypass 写死为 0。三者是「要不要切、切几级」这一连续决策的三档，且都遵循「接口外壳（AXI_TYPEDEF_*/AXI_ASSIGN_*）+ 结构体内核（req_t/resp_t）」范式。
### u4-l2 axi_modify_address 与 axi_id_prepend

本讲介绍两个会主动改写 AXI 字段的纯组合连接器。axi_modify_address 是地址替换器：请求方向把 AW/AR 的 addr 换成外部喂入的新地址（mst_aw_addr_i / mst_ar_addr_i），其余字段（含 W、valid/ready、atop）原样复制，响应方向整块直通。新地址由外部计算、模块本身不算地址，体现「组合优于配置」，可支持任意翻译规则与地址宽度转换；关键约束是新地址须在对应握手完成前保持稳定，以符合 AXI「valid 期间载荷稳定」规则。axi_id_prepend 是 ID 前置/剥离器：请求方向将来源标签 pre_id_i 拼到 ID 最高位前，响应方向利用「id 位于 struct packed 最高位」的排列，借位流类型转换丢弃高位完成剥离。派生宽度 PreIdWidth = AxiIdWidthMstPort − AxiIdWidthSlvPort，为 0 时走零开销直通分支。其真实调用方 axi_mux 把 slave 端口号作为标签拼入 ID，这正是 xbar「master 端口 ID 比 slave 端口更宽、用于路由响应」的物理实现。两模块字段正交（一个只改 addr、一个只改 id），可背靠背串联且无死锁、无冒险。
### u4-l3 axi_delayer：随机延迟通道

本讲覆盖 `axi_delayer` 与其接口外壳 `axi_delayer_intf`、测试台 `tb_axi_delayer` 三个模块。核心结论是：`axi_delayer` 是**验证用的随机抖动器**而非综合时序修复器，与 `axi_cut`（确定性切路径）目的不同。它的结构体内核**自己不写任何逻辑**，仅给五条 AXI 通道各实例化一个外部原语 `stream_delay`（来自 `common_cells 1.39.0`），靠该原语「**只改握手在哪个周期发生、不改载荷、不丢拍、不重排**」的协议契约，在不违反 AXI 铁律的前提下安全插入任意链路。

本讲引入的关键术语与概念：①四个延迟参数 `FixedDelayInput/Output`（默认 1 拍固定延迟）、`StallRandomInput/Output`（默认 0，引入随机停顿）按**事务方向分组**——请求方向 AW/AR/W 用 `*Input`、响应方向 B/R 用 `*Output`，可独立施压；②「停顿/stall」即把 pending 状态人为拉长；③标准的「接口外壳 + 结构体内核」范式：外壳用扁平位宽参数与 `AXI_TYPEDEF/ASSIGN` 宏，内核只认 `req_t`/`resp_t`。`tb_axi_delayer` 用**手搓 `axi_driver`**（而非 rand_master/sim_mem）做活性自检，请求方向随机停顿下连发 200 次写不死锁即通过。本讲也明确：把 delayer 插进 `rand_master → sim_mem + scoreboard` 拓扑后功能应不受影响，「带 delayer 仍通过」是功能正确性的强信号，「带 delayer 偶发失败」则是真实时序 bug 的灵敏探测器——这是后续 U5 仲裁/路由模块与 U16 随机回归方法学的关键工具。
### u5-l1 axi_demux_simple 与 axi_demux

本讲讲解 AXI 的「1 拆 N」路由器。`axi_demux_simple`（Level 2）是纯组合内核：它不译码地址，而是接收外部喂入的 `slv_aw_select_i`/`slv_ar_select_i`（位宽 ⌈log2 N⌉），把 AW/AR 路由到 `NoMstPorts` 个 master 端口之一，体现了「译码在外、路由在内」的分工。请求方向采用「全广播载荷 + 选择性拉 valid」；W 通道没有自己的 select，靠 `w_open` 计数器加 `w_select_q` 寄存器组成的「W 突发队列」跟随其 AW，并用放行条件杜绝跨端口 W 交错。响应方向用两棵独立的 `rr_arb_tree`（`LockIn=1`）把 N 路 B/R 轮询合并成 1 路回收。`axi_demux`（Level 3）= 内核 + 五个可选 `spill_register`（默认仅 AW/AR 开），用于切断组合路径换时序；五开关全关即退化为 simple 行为。为满足 AXI 同 ID 同方向保序，内核例化 `axi_demux_id_counters` 追踪每个低位 ID 在途事务去的端口，同 ID 去往不同端口即停顿；`AxiLookBits` 折中面积与误冲突，`UniqueIds` 在保证唯一时可省掉整组计数器。demux 支持 ATOP，靠 AW 向 AR 计数器 inject 原子 ID 防止 R 通道下溢。需注意文档的 `FallThrough` 参数与源码不一致，以源码为准。
### u5-l2 axi_demux_id_counters：outstanding 跟踪

本讲解析 `axi_demux` 的核心模块 `axi_demux_id_counters`。AXI 要求同 ID 同方向事务按序返回，demux 把同 ID 拆到不同端口后 B/R 响应会跨端口乱序，故须为每个（截断后的）ID 跟踪在途（outstanding）事务数与目标端口。该模块是 \(2^{AxiLookBits}\) 元计数器阵列，每元含一个 `delta_counter` 与端口选择寄存器 `mst_select_q`，提供 lookup（只读占用与端口）、push（+1 并登记端口）、pop（-1）、inject（ATOP 注入 +1）四操作，用 `unique case` 算同周期多操作命中时的净增量。`axi_demux_simple` 例化两份：AW 方向（AW 决策时 push、B 握手时 pop）与 AR 方向（AR 握手 push、最后一拍 R pop）。ATOP 原子读改写无 AR 却有 R，故 AW 握手时向 AR 计数器 inject 一笔 +1 抵消未来 pop，其安全性依赖原子事务 ID 在途唯一。三参数：`AxiLookBits` 权衡面积与误冲突，`MaxTrans` 决定计数器位宽与并发上限，`UniqueIds=1` 在「同方向在途 ID 唯一」或「同 ID 必去同端口」时可整组删除计数器阵列（面积 O(2^I)→O(I)）。需澄清：W 通道保序由独立的 W 突发队列（`w_select_q`）负责，id_counters 只服务 B/R 响应的保序。
### u5-l3 axi_mux：多路汇聚与 ID 扩展

本讲精读 `axi_mux`，它是 `axi_demux` 的对偶模块，做 N 合 1：把 `NoSlvPorts` 个 slave 端口汇聚成 1 个 master 端口。其核心机制是 ID 扩展路由——每个 slave 端口 `i` 用 `axi_id_prepend` 把端口号拼进 AXI ID 的最高 `MstIdxBits = $clog2(NoSlvPorts)` 位，因此 master 端口 ID 宽度 = slave 端口 ID 宽度 + MstIdxBits。请求方向 AW/AR 各用一棵 `rr_arb_tree`（`LockIn=1`）轮询挑一路；W 不仲裁，而是用一个深 `MaxWTrans` 的 W FIFO 按队头端口号转发 W 拍，`last` 拍弹队，杜绝跨端口 W 交错；`lock_aw_valid` 锁存切断 AW 与 W FIFO 的组合依赖以防死锁。响应方向 B/R 不需仲裁，只解码 ID 高位得到 `switch_id`，用 one-hot 仅点亮目标端口的 valid。由于 ID 高位天然隔离各端口，mux 无需 demux 那样的同 ID 在途计数器，这是它更简单的根本原因。在 `axi_xbar` 中每个 master 端口配一个 mux，与每个 slave 端口的 demux 通过内部矩阵对称相连。
### u6-l1 xbar 架构与配置

本讲将 `axi_demux` 与 `axi_mux` 组装成全连接交叉开关 `axi_xbar`：顶层只例化 1 个 `axi_xbar_unmuxed`（demux 阵列 + cross 矩阵）加 `NoMstPorts` 个 `axi_mux`，体现「组合优于配置」。`axi_xbar_unmuxed` 负责路由：每个 slave 端口配一对 `addr_decode`（读写各自译码）和一个 `axi_demux`，多出一路接 `axi_err_slv` 吸收译码失败并返回 `RESP_DECERR`，再用 `axi_multicut` 摆成 cross 矩阵交给 mux。核心结论是 master 端口 ID 宽度 = slave 端口 ID 宽度 + ⌈log₂(NoSlvPorts)⌉，多出的高位是 mux 用 `axi_id_prepend` 前置的来源端口标签，使响应路由无需在途计数器。配置收口于 `xbar_cfg_t`：`LatencyMode` 高 5 位给 demux、低 5 位给 mux，`PipelineStages` 控 cross 处流水线级数；外加 `ATOPs`（原子操作开关）与 `Connectivity`（链路剪裁矩阵）两个独立开关。地址匹配、保序停顿与死锁证明留给后续讲义。
### u6-l2 地址映射、译码错误与默认端口

本讲承接 u6-l1，深入 `axi_xbar_unmuxed` 中地址如何被翻译成 master 端口号，分三个最小模块。其一**地址映射与匹配规则**：xbar 用一张全局共享的 `rule_t` 规则数组（字段 `idx/start_addr/end_addr`）经输入信号 `addr_map_i` 喂入，每个 slave 端口例化两份 `addr_decode`（AW、AR 各一）做查找；区间为**前闭后开**（`start_addr <= addr < end_addr`），区间允许重叠且**重叠时数组下标更大的规则胜出**；xbar 只做分类路由、不改地址。其二**译码错误从端 `axi_err_slv`**：未命中且未启用默认端口时，select 被改写为 `NoMstPorts`，事务落入 demux 多例化出的那一槽；它无条件吸收事务并回 `RESP_DECERR`，写回一个 B、读回 `len+1` 拍 R 且每拍数据为 `0xBADCAB1E`（来自 `RespData`）。其三**默认 master 端口**：由 `en_default_mst_port_i`/`default_mst_port_i` 控制，把未映射事务改送到一个真实 master 端口而非错误从端；映射表与默认端口可在运行期改动，但任一 AW/AR 处于 `valid && !ready` 期间必须保持稳定，否则触发 `$fatal` 断言。
### u6-l3 排序、停顿与无死锁设计

本讲围绕 `axi_xbar` 的两大性质展开：**事务保序**与**无死锁**，核心结论是「为什么内部不能流水」。

关键概念：① **同 ID 同方向保序**——AXI 要求同一 master、同 ID 同方向事务的响应按序返回；本库 xbar **无 reorder buffer**，故该约束被翻译成 **slave 端口停顿**：由 `axi_demux_id_counters` 记录占用与目标端口，仅当同 ID 去往**不同 master 端口**的第二笔事务才需等第一笔完成（同端口天然保序）。② **`AxiIdUsedSlvPorts`/`AxiLookBits`**——只比较 ID 低位 N 位建计数器，用偶发**误冲突(false conflict)**换指数级省面积；`UniqueIds=1` 在前提下把面积从 O(2^I) 降至 O(I)，误冲突只损吞吐不损正确性。

核心死锁分析：用 **Coffman 四条件**审视 W 通道，前三条（互斥、占有等待、不可抢占）由 AXI 协议铁律决定不可改，唯一可下手的是第④条**循环等待**。在 demux 输出与 mux 输入间插 spill 寄存器会配合 `rr_arb_tree` 的推进形成 W FIFO 等待环，故 **xbar 内部 demux↔mux 必须纯组合直连**，spill 只能放对外边界（`LatencyMode` 控制）。mux 内部的 `lock_aw_valid` 是切断 AW→W 组合依赖的合法解耦（与禁止内部寄存器不矛盾），`FallThrough` 是可调时序旋钮（推荐 `FallThrough=0` + `CUT_ALL_AX`）。涉及最小模块：`axi_demux_simple`（停顿门）、`axi_mux`（W FIFO 与仲裁）、`id_counters`。
### u7-l1 axi_fifo 与 spill_register 缓冲

本讲讲透「在两个 AXI 端口之间放缓冲」。`axi_fifo` 为 AW/AR/W/B/R 五条通道各配一个独立的 `fifo_v3`，深度由 `Depth` 统一配置（`Depth=0` 退化为直通），并把 AXI 的 `valid/ready` 握手翻译成 FIFO 的 `push/pop`（`valid=~empty`、`ready=~full`）。`spill_register`（来自外部依赖 `common_cells`）则是深度为 1 的最小缓冲，用于切断组合路径、加一拍延迟，`Bypass=1` 时退化为组合直通。核心结论：切组合路径用 `spill_register`、提供真实缓冲容量用深度可配的 `fifo_v3`，二者不可混用；`FallThrough` 在零延迟与切路径之间取舍。`axi_mux`/`axi_demux` 用 `SpillAw/W/B/Ar/R` 五个 bit（接 `.Bypass(~SpillX)`）做逐通道时序旋钮，默认 AW/AR 开、W/B/R 关。本讲引入术语「在途事务（outstanding）」与「背压（backpressure）」：最大写在途事务数受 `min(Depth, MaxAW)` 约束，长突发下 W 通道可能成为瓶颈；上层 `axi_xbar` 的 `LatencyMode` 是这些 `Spill*` 的批量预设。
### u7-l2 axi_isolate：总线隔离

本讲精读 axi_isolate（内核 axi_isolate_inner、接口外壳 axi_isolate_intf），它是「先排空在途事务、再静默总线」的安全开关，常用于掉电/复位门控前。模块用 isolate_i 请求隔离、isolated_o 报告完成；isolated_o 仅当读写两套 Normal→Hold→Drain→Isolate 状态机都进入 Isolate 态才置位，是真实排空判定而非请求信号的延迟。内核维护 pending_aw、pending_w、pending_ar 三个在途计数器，难点在于原子写 ATOP_R_RESP 会在写地址握手时向读计数器注入 +1（读容量阈值因此翻倍为 2*NumPending），防止读响应拍下溢；Hold 态则专门守住「valid 不可撤」铁律，把已计数的悬空 valid 安全移交 master。TerminateTransaction 是编译期参数：为 0（默认）时隔离期间新事务被无限阻塞，为 1 时复用 axi_demux（select 接 isolated_o）+ axi_err_slv 回 RESP_DECERR（数据 0x1501A7ED）立即终止，两种模式排空时序完全一致。tb_axi_isolate 以随机主从配合随机反复翻转 isolate 做压力测试。
### u7-l3 axi_throttle：限流

本讲精读 `axi_throttle`：一个对 AXI4+ATOP 总线分别限制读/写**同时在途（outstanding）事务数**的限流器，用于保护容量有限的下游（窄 FIFO、外部存储控制器、QoS 限速）。核心是**信用（credit）机制**：发走一笔 AX 消耗 1 个信用，写响应 B 握手归还写信用、读响应 `R.last` 握手归还读信用，信用耗尽则压住新 AX 的 valid，从源头而非靠下游反压来限并发。设计采用**双层阈值**：编译期 `MaxNumAwPending`/`MaxNumArPending`（经 `cf_math_pkg::idx_width` 推导计数器位宽）定硬天花板，运行期输入 `w_credit_i`/`r_credit_i` 定当下工作点，可动态调节。实现极简：例化两个外部 `stream_throttle` 原语，**只门控 AW/AR 的 valid/ready，W/B/R 及所有载荷整体透传**。模块头部契约要求流量「有序或同 ID」（纯标量计数，不建 ID 跟踪表），且**无 `_intf` 外壳**，需自搭接口三明治。它与 `axi_fifo`（缓冲/切路径）、`axi_isolate`（安全排空断开）职责分明，看接口判模块：depth→fifo、isolate 握手→isolate、credit→throttle，三者可串联共存。
### u8-l1 axi_cdc：基于 Gray FIFO 的跨时钟域

本讲讲解 `axi_cdc`：为 AXI 五条通道各配一个 Gray 异步 FIFO 的跨时钟域桥。两个无关时钟域不能裸连，会因亚稳态出错；对策是「同步器 + Gray 码指针」两件套：Gray 码保证指针递增只翻一比特，可经 `SyncStages` 级同步器安全跨域采样；数据不走 Gray，靠 FIFO「写完才能读」协议保证一致，满/空判定保守，故只损吞吐、绝不丢数据。模块自身几乎不写逻辑，安全性封装在外部 common_cells 的 `cdc_fifo_gray` 原语里，并拆成 `axi_cdc_src`（src_clk）与 `axi_cdc_dst`（dst_clk）两半，用 15 组 `(* async *)` 信号（每通道含数据阵列、写指针、读指针）互连，对应 u8-l2 的 `AXI_BUS_ASYNC_GRAY` 接口。请求通道 AW/W/AR（src→dst）写半在 src、读半在 dst，响应通道 B/R 相反；原语名 `_src`/`_dst` 指拓扑上的「写半/读半」而非时钟域。参数 `LogDepth`（深度=2^LogDepth）权衡面积与吞吐，`SyncStages` 权衡 MTBF 与延迟；每通道须单独约束三条异步路径。
### u8-l2 axi_cdc_src / axi_cdc_dst 拆分

本讲承接 u8-l1 的单体 `axi_cdc`，回答为何库还要把它再拆成 `axi_cdc_src` 与 `axi_cdc_dst` 两个子模块。核心结论是：拆分**不改变功能**——顶层 `axi_cdc` 零逻辑，仅作为「重组插座」，用 15 组 `(* async *)` 信号把两半咬合；拆分纯粹服务于**物理实现**，让每个半块只含单一时钟，便于分块综合、把跨域约束精确施加在边界端口、按时钟域就近布局。

讲义引入的关键概念：src 与 dst 之间的异步信号契约是「**数据阵列 + Gray 指针**」，每通道三束（data/wptr/rptr），五通道共 15 组，边界上**没有 valid/ready、没有时钟**；`AXI_BUS_ASYNC_GRAY` 接口（Master/Slave modport）是分体例化的标准连线载体。最重要的**命名陷阱**：原语 `cdc_fifo_gray_src`/`_dst` 的后缀指 FIFO 的**写半/读半**而非时钟域——请求通道写半在 src 域，响应通道写半在 dst 域，因此 `axi_cdc_dst` 内部反而例化 `cdc_fifo_gray_src` 且其时钟端口接 `dst_clk_i`。阅读口诀：谁推数据谁就是写半，写半的时钟接数据源所在域。
### u9-l1 axi_burst_splitter 与粒度切分

本讲义讲解 `axi_burst_splitter` 与 `axi_burst_splitter_gran`：前者是把 `len_limit_i` 钉死为 `8'h00` 的单拍薄外壳，后者（Level 2 引擎）才是真正的拆分核心。引入关键概念「粒度」：以 AXI `len` 值 `len_limit_i` 表达每段子突发最大拍数，`max_beats = len_limit + 1`，段数为 `⌈N/(len_limit+1)⌉`，`len_limit=0` 即全拆单拍。动机是很多下游（AXI-Lite 桥、窄外设、单拍存储接口）吃不下长突发。顶层先用 1:2 `axi_demux_simple` 按 `txn_supported` 分流，不支持者（WRAP、ATOP、部分非 modifiable 短突发）交给 `axi_err_slv` 回 `RESP_SLVERR`。AW/AR 拆分由 `ax_chan` 的 `Idle`/`Busy` 状态机完成，仅 `BURST_INCR` 用 `aligned_addr` 推进地址，`BURST_FIXED` 地址不变，WRAP 不支持；并发在途由 `delta_counter` 阵列经 `id_queue` 按 ID 跟踪。三个响应通道配套改写：W 在段边界插入 `last`，B 把多个响应合并为一个并累积错误改写 SLVERR，R 抑制中间段 `last` 仅保留末拍——实现「地址方向拆、响应方向合」且对数据透明。
### u9-l2 axi_burst_unwrap：回卷突发展开

本讲覆盖 `axi_burst_unwrap`：它把 AXI **回卷突发（WRAP burst）** 在地址方向展开为**至多两个递增突发（INCR）**，对数据与顺序完全透明，使不支持 WRAP 的下游也能服务 cache 行填充类访问。

关键术语：WRAP 突发（地址递增越过窗口顶端即折回窗口底，使关键字 critical word 先到）；**容器大小** container_size = 2^size×(len+1)，WRAP 永不越出此窗口；**回卷边界** 为起始地址向下对齐到容器大小。WRAP 只允许 2/4/8/16 拍。

拆分原理：WRAP 地址序列在「折回点」切开即两段单调递增——第一段从 addr 到 wb+cs、第二段从 wb 到 addr，各封装为 INCR，拼接后与原 WRAP 逐拍一致；若起始地址落在回卷边界上则等价单个 INCR，走零开销直通。

模块三层：顶层用 1:2 `axi_demux` 按 `txn_supported()` 分流——单拍、Modifiable 的 WRAP、INCR/FIXED 进入拆分内核，ATOP 与非 Modifiable WRAP 被拒并回 `RESP_SLVERR`；`axi_burst_unwrap_ax_chan` 的 Idle/Busy 状态机完成地址拆分；W/B/R 三条 FSM 配合 `axi_burst_counters`（按 AXI ID 跟踪在途拍数）完成响应方向的「W 插 last、B 合并、R 抑制中间 last」。AXI 规范 A3.4.1 仅允许拆分 Modifiable 事务。
### u9-l3 axi_serializer：事务序列化

`axi_serializer` 是一个「事务降级器」：它把上游发往下游的所有 AW/AR 的 `id` 强制抹零（写为 `'0`），使只认单一 ID 的能力受限下游（如 AXI-Lite 桥、单 outstanding 外设）正常工作；同时在上游响应返回前把原 id 还原，因此上游无感。其核心数据通路是读写两个独立的 **ID FIFO**（基于 `fifo_v3`）：请求握手时押入原 id 当备忘录，响应握手时按到达顺序弹出还原——因为所有下游 id 都是 0，唯一能区分事务的就是顺序。FIFO 的 `full` 反压请求方向（防原 id 丢失），`empty` 屏蔽响应方向（防错配）；其深度即各方向在途事务上限，决定了吞吐。读 FIFO 仅在 `r.last` 弹出（一次读突发多拍 R），写 FIFO 握手即弹（单 B）；`FALL_THROUGH=0` 使输出晚一拍，恰好对齐响应。AXI5 原子操作（ATOP）由 **AtopIdle / AtopDrain / AtopExecute** 三态机处理：先排空所有在途事务，再独占执行，并为 `ATOP_R_RESP`（无 AR 却有 R 的原子写）人为向读 FIFO 补一次押栈以还原其 R 的 id。序列化的代价是吞吐——去掉 ID 级并行与乱序空间；它与降突发长度的 `axi_burst_splitter` 正交，可串联喂养「单 ID + 单拍」最简下游，并为后续 u10-l2 的 `axi_id_serialize`（每 master 端口 ID 一个 serializer）提供积木。
### u10-l1 axi_id_remap：ID 重映射

本讲解析 `axi_id_remap`（含内部子模块 `axi_id_remap_table` 与接口外壳 `axi_id_remap_intf`）：把上游稀疏的宽 ID 动态重映射为下游紧凑的窄 ID，且**保留 ID 独立性**——不同上游 ID 必映射到不同下游 ID，这是它区别于 `axi_id_serialize`（放弃独立性换更窄 ID）的根本性质。核心是两张以输出（窄）ID 为索引、读写各自独立的重映射表，每项存 `(inp_id, cnt)`，由 free/exists/push/pop 四操作完成槽位分配、同 ID 复用保序、响应当拍把窄 ID 还原为宽 ID。关键参数为窄 ID 位宽下限 `IdxWidth=⌈log₂(AxiSlvPortMaxUniqIds)⌉` 与每 ID 并发深度 `AxiMaxTxnsPerId`；单方向容量为二者乘积，超出即反压。四状态 FSM（Ready/HoldAR/HoldAW/HoldAx）锁存选定输出 ID 以满足「valid 期间 id 稳定」铁律；`ATOP_R_RESP` 原子写须占用读写两表同时空闲的 ID 并双向 push，使 B 与 R 响应都能正确还原原 ID。该模块被 `axi_iw_converter` 用作窄下游接宽上游的胶水。
### u10-l2 axi_id_serialize：序列化降 ID

本讲精读 `axi_id_serialize`：当下游 master ID 位宽卡死、连 `axi_id_remap` 都装不下（即 `AxiSlvPortMaxUniqIds > 2**AxiMstPortIdWidth`）时，它以**放弃 ID 独立性**为代价，允许两个不同 slave ID 映射到同一 master ID，使这两组事务被迫相互保序——故称「序列化」。核心是三段式通路：`axi_demux` 按 `SlvIdMap` 把事务**分桶**（桶号即目标 master ID）→ 每桶一个 `axi_serializer` 在桶内把 ID 抹零、并用存全宽 slave ID 的 FIFO 在响应方向还原原上游 ID → `axi_mux` 合并并把桶号前置进 master ID 高位。映射由编译期函数 `map_slv_ids` 一次性算成 `localparam`：默认 `(id+base)%N` 取模，可用显式 `IdMap` 覆盖（后写胜），`MstIdBaseOffset` 不影响被覆盖项。输出端 `id>>1`/`id<<1` 丢弃并补回 serializer 留下的恒 0 最低位；N=1 退化时改用 `axi_id_prepend` 零扩展。选型口诀：能保留独立性就用 `remap`，被迫放弃才用 `serialize`；面积无绝对优劣。它由 `axi_iw_converter` 在降 ID 分支自动选用，且无专属测试台。
### u10-l3 axi_iw_converter：ID 宽度转换

`axi_iw_converter` 是 AXI 库中处理两端 ID 宽度不一致的统一入口模块。它自身几乎不写逻辑，本质是一个编译期「分发器」：按 slave/master 两端 ID 宽度的关系，从四种实现中编译期选一种。决策树两级判定——先看 master 端是否更窄（严格 `<`），再用判据 `AxiSlvPortMaxUniqIds ≤ 2^AxiMstPortIdWidth` 区分：成立则例化 `axi_id_remap`（保留 ID 独立性），否则例化 `axi_id_serialize`（放弃独立性换更窄 ID）；master 端更宽时用 `axi_id_prepend` 高位补零；等宽则 `assign` 直通。

关键术语与概念：「降宽/升宽」「在途唯一 ID 数」容量判据、「按分支条件生效」的 Max* 参数并集、编译层级 Level 4（= max(L2 remap, L3 serialize, L2 prepend)+1）作为「纯组合、无新协议逻辑」的证据、结构体内核与零逻辑接口外壳 `axi_iw_converter_intf`。

核心结论：该模块是 U10 单元的统一验证与封装入口；唯一测试台 `tb_axi_iw_converter` 用「除 ID 外逐字段相等」加「同上游 ID 映射到同下游 ID」两条不变式自检，靠 `run_vsim.sh` 参数矩阵（其 if 分支与 DUT 同构）覆盖全部四条分支。它与 `axi_dw_converter`（数据宽度转换）职责正交，并将在异构网络中充当 ID 子网胶水。
### u11-l1 axi_dw_downsizer：宽到窄

本讲聚焦 `axi_dw_downsizer`：它把宽 slave 端口接到窄 master 端口，本质不是简单连线，而是把一个宽 beat 拆成多个窄 beat，并重算 `size`、`len`、`addr`、`wstrb` 与响应拍数。核心数学为转换比 `conv_ratio=ceil(2^size/M)`、对齐修正 `align_adj` 与输出 `burst_len=(len+1)·conv_ratio−align_adj−1`；`conv_ratio==1` 走 PASSTHROUGH，否则按是否超过 256 拍选 INCR_DOWNSIZE 或 SPLIT_INCR_DOWNSIZE（切多段 INCR）。读通路用 `AxiMaxReads` 个并行引擎配 `id_queue` 路由，再做 R 拍序列化（拼窄为宽）；写通路用 lane steering（拆宽为窄）、strb 重算及 FIFO 把多个 B 合为一个。WRAP 与多拍 FIXED 不支持，经 `axi_err_slv` 回 SLVERR，跨拍/跨段响应用 `resp_precedence` 合并。该模块为结构体内核，用户通常经统一外壳 `axi_dw_converter_intf`（由 `axi_dw_converter` 按宽度三路分发）使用，测试台以双端口 monitor 作黄金模型自检。
### u11-l2 axi_dw_upsizer：窄到宽

本讲精读 `axi_dw_upsizer`（窄→宽数据宽度转换内核），是 `axi_dw_downsizer` 的镜像：slv 端口窄、mst 端口宽，把多个窄 beat 合并成更少的宽 beat，输出宽 `len` 小于输入窄 `len`。核心公式 `len=(aligned_end−aligned_start)>>AxiMstPortMaxSize`（借助 `aligned_addr`/`beat_addr`，AW、AR 两处相同），不可修改（Non-modifiable）或单拍事务直接 PASSTHROUGH。

读通路用 `AxiMaxReads` 个并行引擎按 AXI ID 路由以保序，关键机制是「持有一拍宽 R、用 lane steering 展开成多拍窄 R」，字节取完才向下游置 `r_ready`；写通路用单引擎累加多拍窄 W 成一拍宽 W，按宽边界或末拍释放，B 通道直接透传（写事务数不变，与 downsizer 显著不同）。不支持 WRAP 突发（回 SLVERR，单拍 WRAP 除外）；带读响应的 ATOP 原子写需把 AW 注入读通路处理。用户经统一外壳 `axi_dw_converter`/`axi_dw_converter_intf`（按两端宽度编译期三选一：直通/下转/上转）使用，测试台以 `axi_dw_upsizer_monitor` 双端口黄金模型自检，与内核共用同一套公式互为参照。
### u11-l3 axi_dw_converter：自动选择

本讲介绍 `axi_dw_converter`——AXI 数据宽度转换族的统一入口，本质是零逻辑的编译期分发器（dispatcher），自身不写任何转换逻辑，只按 master 端口宽度（`AxiMstPortDataWidth`，面向下游 slave）与 slave 端口宽度（`AxiSlvPortDataWidth`，面向上游 master）的大小关系三选一：等宽用两根 `assign` 零开销直通；master 更宽则例化 `axi_dw_upsizer`（窄→宽）；master 更窄则例化 `axi_dw_downsizer`（宽→窄）。该判断由生成块条件（conditional generate）在编译期完成，三条分支互斥展开，未命中分支对综合工具完全不可见，这也解释了等宽直通为何合法——避开了宽度不等时两端结构体类型不匹配的赋值冲突。被选分支把全部参数原样透传，端口与两个内核逐字段一致，故命中哪条即等价于哪个内核，其协议限制（不支持 WRAP 等）一并继承。接口外壳 `axi_dw_converter_intf` 用两个宽度参数分别生成 slave/master 侧的 W/R 通道类型（AW/B/AR 不携带变宽数据故两端共用一个类型），再经 `AXI_TYPEDEF_*`/`AXI_ASSIGN_*` 宏搬运后例化内核。converter 没有专属测试台：downsize/upsize 两分支由现有 TB（均以 `_intf` 为 DUT）间接覆盖，等宽分支靠“无逻辑”论证。本讲承接 u11-l1、u11-l2，为 U11 数据宽度转换单元收口；converter 位于 Bender Level 3，依赖 Level 2 的两个内核。
### u12-l1 AXI-Lite 接口与 lite 连接器

本讲（U12 第一篇）引入 AXI4-Lite 子系统，阐明它是 AXI4 的严格子集：每个事务恒为单拍，故删去 `len/size/burst/last`；无事务 ID、无原子操作，故删去 `id/atop/lock/cache/qos/region/user`，只剩 `addr/prot/data/strb/resp`。讲解了 `AXI_LITE`/`AXI_LITE_DV` 接口（后者多 `clk_i` 专用于仿真断言）及其 Master/Slave/Monitor modport，并用 `AXI_LITE_TYPEDEF_*` 宏生成通道与 `req_t`/`resp_t` 结构体（字段分工与完整 AXI4 同构），用 `AXI_LITE_ASSIGN*` 宏在接口与结构体间接线，复用「分隔符戏法」。核心积木两个：`axi_lite_join` 是零逻辑纯直连器，靠一句 `AXI_LITE_ASSIGN(out, in)` 展开，B/R 子宏参数翻转以处理响应方向；`axi_lite_dw_converter` 按 slave/master 宽度编译期三选一（下转/上转/直通），是 `axi_dw_converter` 的 Lite 版，因单拍事务大幅简化，本质只是字节通路的对齐与搬运。本讲确立了 Lite 子系统的「接口外壳 + 结构体内核」范式，为后续 lite_mux/demux/xbar 与 axi_lite_regs 奠基。
### u12-l2 axi_lite_mux / demux / xbar

本讲讲解 AXI-Lite 多路复用族三件套：axi_lite_mux（N→1 汇聚）、axi_lite_demux（1→N 拆分）、axi_lite_xbar（全连接交叉开关）。核心结论：Lite 无 id 字段，但强制保序、单拍事务，故用深度为 MaxTrans 的 select FIFO 替代完整 AXI4 的 axi_id_prepend 与 axi_demux_id_counters——请求方向记录路由决策 select 并按序入队，响应方向按队头回放至原端口。mux 用 rr_arb_tree 轮询选源，写通路 w_fifo→b_fifo 两级、读通路 r_fifo 一级，并用 lock_aw_valid 切断 AW→W 组合依赖防死锁；demux 遵循「译码在外、路由在内」，select 由外部喂入。xbar 每 slave 端口配一个 demux、每 master 端口配一个 mux，cross 矩阵转置相连；译码错误经 axi_lite_to_axi 升格后交 axi_err_slv 回 RESP_DECERR（数据 0xBADCAB1E）。配置复用 xbar_cfg_t，LatencyMode 高 5 位给 demux、低 5 位给 mux。
### u12-l3 axi_lite_regs：寄存器映射

本讲剖析库内最常用的 AXI4-Lite 从端模块 `axi_lite_regs`，它把一组**字节粒度**的触发器阵列 `reg_q` 同时挂在两个面上：AXI4-Lite 软件（`axi_req_i`/`axi_resp_o`）与硬件直连面（`reg_d_i`/`reg_load_i`/`reg_q_o`/`wr_active_o`/`rd_active_o`），两路写同一组寄存器，构成「双面寄存器堆」。存储选字节而非字，是为配合 `wstrb` 选通与字节级只读。地址以 **chunk**（`AxiStrbWidth`=数据宽度/8 字节）为单位译码，用两份自动生成规则表的 `addr_decode` 分别服务 AW/AR，越界地址回 `SLVERR`。写通路做四重判定：地址合法、`prot` 达标（`PrivProtOnly`/`SecuProtOnly` 门禁 `prot[0]`/`prot[1]`）、字节非只读、无硬件直载冲突；`chunk_loaded` 停顿仅在非只读字节上拉低 `aw/w_ready` 以防两路同拍竞争，只读字节可被硬件并行直载。响应规则：只要真正改写一个字节即回 `OKAY`，全命中只读才回 `SLVERR`；`wr_active_o` 只反映「被选中」与只读无关。读通路组合地拼 `reg_q_o` 到 R，错误读返回固定数据 `0xBA5E1E55`，R/B 各经一级 `spill_register` 切组合路径并加一拍。库另提供接口外壳 `axi_lite_regs_intf`，测试台 `tb_axi_lite_regs` 是「定向+随机+硬件直载+并发 checker」自检范本。关键术语：双面访问、chunk、`AxiReadOnly`、`RegRstVal`、`wr/rd_active_o`、prot 门禁、`spill_register`。
### u12-l4 axi_lite_mailbox：邮箱与中断

本讲精读 `axi_lite_mailbox`——一个对称双端口核间通信邮箱，对外暴露两个 AXI4-Lite 从端口，二者之间靠**两条单向 FIFO**（`i_mbox_0_to_1`、`i_mbox_1_to_0`）互联，任一端口写下的数据只能被对端读出，且方向交叉连线保证语义。每个端口背后是一个 `axi_lite_mailbox_slave`，含 10 个寄存器（MBOXW/MBOXR/STATUS/ERROR/WIRQT/RIRQT/IRQS/IRQEN/IRQP/CTRL），地址按 `AxiDataWidth/8` 线性排布，由 generate 自动生成 `addr_decode` 规则，读/写各经两级译码加 `spill_register` 输出以满足 AXI stable 要求。数据寄存器直连 FIFO：写 MBOXW push（满回 SLVERR 加写错误位），读 MBOXR pop（空回幻数 `0xFEEDDEAD` 加 SLVERR 加读错误位）。中断是一条完整链路：阈值比较 → STATUS → sticky 的 IRQS（锁存一次，软件写位应答）→ IRQEN 使能 → IRQP（= IRQS & IRQEN）→ 按位或得电平中断，再由顶层按 `IrqEdgeTrig`/`IrqActHigh` 转电平或边沿输出；阈值写入带钳位保证满 FIFO 必触发。运维上，写 CTRL 触发两端 flush 取或清空 FIFO，ERROR 读即清且同拍新生错误不丢失。`tb_axi_lite_mailbox` 用两个随机 Lite 主端把双向投递、阈值中断、错误中断、flush 串成定向脚本，以 `Errors: 0` 判成败。本讲巩固的 AXI-Lite 从端译码与中断三件套写法，将在下一单元 U13 的协议转换桥中复用。
### u13-l1 axi_to_axi_lite 与 axi_lite_to_axi

本讲讲解 AXI4 与 AXI4-Lite 之间的双向协议转换桥，核心结论是两方向难度不对称——因为 Lite 是 AXI4 的严格子集。`axi_lite_to_axi`（Lite→AXI4）只需补默认值（id=0、len=0、burst=FIXED、size=$clog2(数据宽度/8)、w.last=1、cache 由外部输入提供），是纯组合、无损的一段 assign，无需时钟。`axi_to_axi_lite`（AXI4→Lite）则需丢信息，构成三级流水线：`axi_atop_filter` 过滤原子操作、`axi_burst_splitter` 拆突发为单拍、`axi_to_axi_lite_id_reflect` 裁剪信号并完成 ID 回射，顺序不可调换。关键机制「ID 回射」：Lite 无 ID，模块用两个 fifo_v3（深度即最大在途事务数）暂存 AW/AR 的请求 id，在 B/R 响应返回时拼回，并以 FIFO 的 full/empty 做请求反压与响应门控；id_reflect 用 assume property 强制输入满足 atop==0、len==0、w.last==1，把「必须先接前两级」的依赖显式化。N 拍突发在 Lite 侧会被压扁为 N 个单拍事务，吞吐受 FIFO 深度限制。
### u13-l2 axi_lite_to_apb

本讲精读全库唯一的 APB 模块 axi_lite_to_apb（编译层级 Level 2），它把 AXI4-Lite 桥接到多个 APB4 从端。先讲 APB4 协议：主端驱动两拍节拍——Setup 拍 PSELx=1、PENABLE=0，Access 拍 PENABLE=1，从端用 PREADY 决定完成或插入等待、PSLVERR 报错。模块把 Lite 读、写请求归一成统一的 int_req_t，经 rr_arb_tree（LockIn=1）串行化，再由两态 FSM（Setup→Access）配合 addr_decode 选片产生两相波形。三处关键转换：地址用 aligned_addr 按数据宽度对齐；pslverr 翻译为 OKAY/SLVERR；译码失败返回 DECERR、空写（wstrb=0）返回 OKAY。另有 PipelineRequest/PipelineResponse 开关选 spill_register 或 fall_through_register，接口外壳 axi_lite_to_apb_intf 用 onehot_to_bin 在数组内核与扁平端口间桥接。
### u14-l1 axi_to_mem 及其变体

本讲讲解 `axi_to_mem` 家族，它把 AXI4+ATOP 五通道翻译成扁平的「存储接口」。核心引擎是 Level 2 的 `axi_to_detailed_mem`：它把突发拆成逐拍请求（强制 INCR，不拆突发需前级接 `axi_burst_splitter`）、用一棵 `stream_mux` 对读写做 QoS 感知仲裁、经内嵌子模块 `mem_stream_to_banks_detailed` 把一条宽字按数据车道分发到多个 bank、再按 `sel_b/sel_r` 把响应拼成 B/R。其根本局限是「读写共享一条路径、各占 50% 带宽」。

`axi_to_mem`（Level 3）只是它的精简外壳，固定 `UserWidth=1`、悬空边带、`err/exokay` 接地。存储接口的最关键契约是：每个被接受的请求（含写）都必须回恰好一个 `rvalid`，缓冲深度 `BufDepth` 应等于 SRAM 响应延迟。

三个 Level 4 变体针对读写 50% 瓶颈做增强：`banked` 用 demux 静态分流读写各接一个 `axi_to_mem`、经 `stream_xbar` 按地址位路由到 `MemNumBanks` 个宏；`interleaved` 读写共享同一组 bank、每 bank 用 `rr_arb_tree` 仲裁、读可旁路写、用 FIFO 回放仲裁结果；`split` 读写各独占一半物理端口、需多端口 SRAM。三者因读写静态拆分均可设 `UniqueIds=1`。选型看三点：是否需要读写并行、容量是否大于一个宽字、SRAM 是否双口。
### u14-l2 axi_from_mem / lite_from_mem

本讲义讲解 `axi_lite_from_mem`（Level 2，核心）与 `axi_from_mem`（Level 3，薄包装），它们把 SRAM-like 的 req/gnt/rvalid 协议「反向适配」成下游 AXI4-Lite/AXI4 事务，使任何只会说 SRAM 协议的模块（如 DMA 前端）能直接发起 AXI 访问。核心结论有三：一是与上一讲 `axi_to_mem` 镜像对称，mem 侧信号同名但方向逐根相反；二是请求通路用 `aw_sent_q`/`w_sent_q` 两位状态机解耦 Lite 的 AW/W 通道，两条都握手才授予，授予信号兼任响应 FIFO 的 push；三是响应通路用深度=MaxRequests、宽度仅 1-bit 的 FIFO 记录「写=1/读=0」请求顺序，在无 ID 的 Lite 协议上实现保序回收（前提是下游按序响应）。关键术语：每笔 mem 请求恰产生一笔单拍 Lite 事务、响应延迟不固定绝非 1、不支持突发与 ATOP；`axi_from_mem` 体现「组合优于配置」，即 `axi_lite_from_mem` + 纯组合 `axi_lite_to_axi`，cache 属性须从外部端口喂入。
### u14-l3 简单端点：zero_mem / lfsr / err_slv

本讲介绍三个常备 AXI 端点积木（均属固定行为 Slave，不译码地址、不维护业务存储）。axi_err_slv 是错误从端：对任意事务完整完成五通道握手并恒定返回 DECERR 或 SLVERR，读数据填可识别魔数；它用三组 fifo_v3 自行摆时序，可选前置 axi_atop_filter 兼容原子操作，并作为 axi_xbar 内置的译码错误从端，兜底未映射地址、返回 DECERR 加魔数 BADCAB1E。axi_zero_mem 复用 axi_to_detailed_mem，把写方向存储侧输出全部悬空、读数据硬接 0、授予信号回环，充当 /dev/zero。axi_lfsr 先经 axi_to_axi_lite 降到 Lite，再驱动两个独立的 axi_opt_lfsr：写侧压缩模式把写数据异或折叠成校验、读侧生成模式吐出可复现的伪随机序列，读写互不影响，并提供串行播种端口设初值。三者选型关键看响应码：要错误用 err_slv，要正常但内容特殊用 zero_mem 或 lfsr。
### u15-l1 ATOPs 原子操作与 axi_atop_filter

本讲聚焦 AXI5 的原子操作 ATOPs 及其消化模块 `axi_atop_filter`。ATOPs 叠加在 AXI4 之上，只挂在写地址通道 AW 的 6 位 `aw_atop` 上：`[5:4]` 是操作大类（NONE/STORE/LOAD/SWAP-CMP），`[3]` 是端序，`[2:0]` 是运算符；最高位 `[5]` 即常量 `ATOP_R_RESP`（位下标，值为 5），为 1 表示该原子写除 B 响应外还要在 R 通道返回数据。关键问题是：带 R 响应的原子写（ATOMICLOAD、SWAP、CMP）若直达不支持 ATOP 的普通从端，后者只回 B 不回 R，会令主端死锁。`axi_atop_filter` 作为隔离层插在「会发 ATOP 的主端」与「不懂 ATOP 的从端」之间，给出两条保证——master 端 `aw_atop` 恒为 0；slave 端的原子写被吸收并以 `RESP_SLVERR` 完整响应（B 必给，R 按 `len+1` 拍注入）。内部用 W/R 两个有限状态机协作，中间以 1 深 `stream_register` 传递「注 R 命令」，并用带 `underflow` 标志的在途写计数器兼顾普通写放行；因 AXI 规定原子写 ID 在途唯一，响应注入无需排序。
### u15-l2 axi_inval_filter：缓存无效化

本讲围绕单一核心模块 `axi_inval_filter` 展开，解决无硬件缓存一致性（cache coherence）系统中「写旁路」带来的陈旧数据问题：当 DMA 或非缓存主端绕过 cache 直写内存时，让 L1 cache 中对应的旧副本同步失效。核心结论是：它与上讲的 `axi_atop_filter` 同属「监听 AW + 产生副作用」家族，但本质区别在于——`inval_filter` 对 AXI 流量完全透明（不改地址/数据/响应码），仅从一个独立的非 AXI 端口（`inval_addr_o / inval_valid_o / inval_ready_i`）旁路通知 L1。结构分为三块：受 `en_i` 控制的 AW FIFO（深度 `MaxTxns`，存整条 `aw_chan_t`）、默认全通道直通（仅 FIFO 满时反压 AW）、两态无效化 FSM。关键术语包括：写旁路、cacheline、`L1LineWidth`（行内字节，默认 2 的幂）、突发总字节 `B_burst=(len+1)·2^size`。FSM 用行内偏移判定单行/多行跨越，多行时按行宽步进逐行发地址，恰好覆盖被写到的行。无效化由 AW 触发、与 W/B 解耦。该模块为叶子模块，无官方 testbench 与内部例化。
### u15-l3 axi_xp 交叉点与 interleaved_xbar

本讲在标准 `axi_xbar`（u6-l1）之上介绍两个高级互连变体。`axi_xp`（Crosspoint，编译层级 Level 6，居全库顶层）追求**同构（homomorphous）端口**：slave 与 master 两侧 ID 等宽（共用 `AxiIdWidth`），实现为「1 个 `axi_xbar` + 每 master 端口 1 个 `axi_id_remap`」，由 id_remap 把内部被加宽的 ID 压回原宽，从而可背靠背级联成 mesh/fat-tree 等规则网络；代价是多出 id_remap 面积与 `AxiSlvPortMaxUniqIds` 并发上限，且不对外引出 xbar 的「默认 master 端口」。`axi_interleaved_xbar`（Level 4）则新增运行期可切换的**地址交错路由**：`interleaved_mode_ena_i=1` 时取地址第 16 位起的 bank 位直接选 master 端口，并把这些位从下游地址中抹掉，实现存储 bank 交错；它不复用 `axi_xbar_unmuxed`，而自拼 `addr_decode+axi_demux+axi_mux+axi_err_slv`，cross 为纯组合、不可流水。两模块均无 testbench、被源码与 README 标为「实验性」，生产使用需自补验证。选型口诀：通用优先 `axi_xbar`；要等宽可级联选 `axi_xp`；要 bank 交错才考虑 `axi_interleaved_xbar`。
### u15-l4 异构网络设计实战

本讲是异构片上网络的综合实战，把五件积木拼成真实 SoC 互联：路由骨干 `axi_xbar`（纯组合）、时钟域边界 `axi_cdc`（每通道一个 Gray FIFO）、宽度适配 `axi_dw_converter`（自动 up/down/直通，只改数据）、ID 适配 `axi_iw_converter`（prepend/remap/serialize/直通，只改 ID）、边界安全阀 `axi_isolate`（排空计数 + ATOP inject，`isolated_o` 拉高时静默）。核心结论：只有 `axi_xbar` 内部纯组合，其余状态化转换器只能挂在 xbar 对外端口，这是无死锁的前提；xbar 出口 ID 比入口宽 ⌈log₂(NoSlvPorts)⌉ 位，是常需配 `axi_iw_converter` 的根因。各转换器字段正交，串联须保证「宽度契约」处处成立；每个转换器须整体落单一时钟域，CDC 是时序约束分界。`axi_isolate` 应紧贴 CDC 上游部署。
### u16-l1 定向随机验证方法学

本讲以 `tb_axi_xbar` 为载体讲解定向随机验证：在随机生成地址、ID、突发长度、停顿拍数的基础上施加约束以保证激励合法，再由旁路监听的黄金模型自动判对错。随机主端 `axi_rand_master` 用三道闸门——地址区间登记、在途计数上限反压、ID 合法化——确保合法性，闸门之内随机探索；从端 `axi_rand_slave` 提供随机响应与背压。测试台由时钟复位、随机激励、自检器、停止控制四类并发块组成，仿真长度由激励量而非固定时长决定。核心结论：xbar 只路由、不碰数据，故不用比对数据值的通用 scoreboard，而用专用的 `axi_xbar_monitor` 比对路由契约（端口、ID、addr、len、last 标志），以 `rand_id_queue` 容忍同 ID 保序下的乱序，并用 `Expected/Conducted/Failed` 三计数加信号量判通过（`Conducted==0` 同样判失败，防「空跑误通过」）。回归借 `run_vsim.sh` 的 `SEEDS` 数组与 `-sv_seed` 控制随机种子：种子 0 作可复现基线，`--random-seed` 追加真随机，同一 TB 跑多种子即可成倍扩展覆盖。
### u16-l2 总线比较与回归工具

本讲介绍四件 AXI 等价性检查与事务可观测性工具，分两条路线：可综合的 axi_bus_compare、axi_slave_compare，与仅仿真的 axi_chan_compare、axi_dumper。共同内核是「请求方向入队、到达方向出队比对」：chan_compare 用 SV 无界队列最直白实现、失配即 `$error` 并打印逐字段对照表；bus_compare 用每 ID 一个 stream_fifo、两侧同 id 都 valid 才弹的同步机制做成硬件，输出 mismatch/busy 信号；slave_compare 是「一主驱双从」包装，请求 fork 给参考/测试两个从端、master 只取参考响应、测试响应握手后丢弃，内部复用 bus_compare。IgnoreId、AllowReordering、UseSize、FifoDepth 分别处理 ID 被改写、响应乱序、窄传输、时序差四类合法差异。axi_dumper 把每个握手 beat 落盘为类 Python 字典日志，整体被 ifdef TARGET_SIMULATION 包住（仓库脚本不自动定义，需手动 +define），配 axi_dumper_interpret.py 用 ast.literal_eval 解析、重拼事务并校验 AR↔R、AW↔W↔B 的 last 自洽。这些工具与 u3-l2 的 scoreboard 互补，覆盖在线自检到事后离线重放，核心术语包括等价性检查、抽头式比对、逐拍比对与黄金队列模型。

---

## 本讲义规格

- id: u16-l3
- 文件名: u16-3-timing-pipeline-eda.md
- 写入路径: axi-tutorial/u16-3-timing-pipeline-eda.md

- 学习阶段: advanced
- 主题: 系统讨论本库的时序/流水线设计哲学：spill_register 与 LatencyMode 的取舍、xbar 中 CUT_ALL_AX 推荐配置、为何内部不插寄存器，以及保持对多种 EDA 工具兼容的编码约束。
- 学习目标: 根据频率目标选择 LatencyMode 与 FallThrough；理解 xbar 不插内部寄存器的死锁边界；掌握为兼容多 EDA 工具而保持简单 SV 子集的原则
- 应覆盖的最小模块: doc/axi_xbar，README，scripts
- 关键源码: doc/axi_xbar.md，README.md，scripts/synth.sh
- 代码实践任务: 为一个目标频率较高的设计选择 xbar 的 LatencyMode 与 FallThrough，并写出该选择对 W 通道组合路径的影响。
- 依赖讲义: u6-l3，u7-l1

content.content:
1	# AXI4+ATOP Fully-Connected Crossbar
2	
3	`axi_xbar` is a fully-connected crossbar that implements the full AXI4 specification plus atomic operations (ATOPs) from AXI5.
4	
5	
6	## Design Overview
7	
8	`axi_xbar` is a fully-connected crossbar, which means that each master module that is connected to a *slave port* for of the crossbar has direct wires to all slave modules that are connected to the *master ports* of the crossbar.
9	A block-diagram of the crossbar is shown below:
10	
11	![Block-diagram showing the design of the full AXI4 Crossbar.](axi_xbar.png  "Block-diagram showing the design of the full AXI4 Crossbar.")
12	
13	The crossbar has a configurable number of slave and master ports.
14	
15	The ID width of the master ports is wider than that of the slave ports.  The additional ID bits are used by the internal multiplexers to route responses.  The ID width of the master ports must be `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts + $clog_2(NoSlvPorts)`.
16	
17	
18	## Address Map
19	
20	One address map is shared by all master ports.  The *address map* contains an arbitrary number of rules (but at least one).  Each *rule* maps one address range to one master port.  Multiple rules can map to the same master port.  The address ranges of two rules may overlap: in case two address ranges overlap, the rule at the higher (more significant) position in the address map prevails.
21	
22	Each address range includes the start address but does **not** include the end address.  That is, an address *matches* an address range if and only if
23	```
24	    addr >= start_addr && addr < end_addr
25	```
26	The start address must be less than or equal to the end address.
27	
28	The address map can be defined and changed at run time (it is an input signal to the crossbar).  However, the address map must not be changed while any AW or AR channel of any slave port is valid.
29	
30	
31	## Decode Errors and Default Slave Port
32	
33	Each slave port has its own internal *decode error slave* module.  If the address of a transaction does not match any rule, the transaction is routed to that decode error slave module.  That module absorbs each transaction and responds with a decode error (with the proper number of beats).  The data of each read response beat is `32'hBADCAB1E` (zero-extended or truncated to match the data width).
34	
35	Each slave port can have a default master port.  If the default master port is enabled for a slave port, any address on that slave port that does not match any rule is routed to the default master port instead of the decode error slave.  The default master port can be enabled and changed at run time (it is an input signal to the crossbar), and the same restrictions as for the address map apply.
36	
37	
38	## Configuration
39	
40	The crossbar is configured through the `Cfg` parameter with a `axi_pkg::xbar_cfg_t` struct.  That struct has the following fields:
41	
42	| Name                 | Type               | Definition |
43	|:---------------------|:-------------------|:-----------|
44	| `NoSlvPorts`         | `int unsigned`     | The number of AXI slave ports of the crossbar (in other words, how many AXI master modules can be attached). |
45	| `NoMstPorts`         | `int unsigned`     | The number of AXI master ports of the crossbar (in other words, how many AXI slave modules can be attached). |
46	| `MaxMstTrans`        | `int unsigned`     | Each slave port can have at most this many transactions [in flight](../doc#in-flight). |
47	| `MaxSlvTrans`        | `int unsigned`     | Each master port can have at most this many transactions per ID [in flight](../doc#in-flight). |
48	| `FallThrough`        | `bit`              | Routing decisions on the AW channel fall through to the W channel.  Enabling this allows the crossbar to accept a W beat in the same cycle as the corresponding AW beat, but it increases the combinatorial path of the W channel with logic from the AW channel. |
49	| `LatencyMode`        | `enum logic [9:0]` | Latency on the individual channels, defined in detail in section *Pipelining and Latency* below. |
50	| `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts` | `int unsigned`     | The AXI ID width of the slave ports. |
51	| `AxiIdUsedSlvPorts`  | `int unsigned`     | The number of slave port ID bits (starting at the least significant) the crossbar uses to determine the uniqueness of an AXI ID (see section *Ordering and Stalls* below).  This value has to be less or equal than `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts`. |
52	| `UniqueIds`          | `bit`              | If you can guarantee that the ID of each transaction is always unique among all in-flight transactions in the same direction, setting this parameter to `1'b1` simplifies the crossbar.  See the [`axi_demux` documentation](axi_demux#ordering-and-stalls) for details. |
53	| `AxiAddrWidth`       | `int unsigned`     | The AXI address width. |
54	| `AxiDataWidth`       | `int unsigned`     | The AXI data width. |
55	| `NoAddrRules`        | `int unsigned`     | The number of address map rules. |
56	
57	The other parameters are types to define the ports of the crossbar.  The `*_chan_t` and `*_req_t`/`*_resp_t` types must be bound in accordance to the configuration with the `AXI_TYPEDEF` macros defined in `axi/typedef.svh`.  The `rule_t` type must be bound to an address decoding rule with the same address width as in the configuration, and `axi_pkg` contains definitions for 64- and 32-bit addresses.
58	
59	### Pipelining and Latency
60	
61	The `LatencyMode` parameter allows to insert spill registers after each channel (AW, W, B, AR, and R) of each master port (i.e., each multiplexer) and before each channel of each slave port (i.e., each demultiplexer).  Spill registers cut combinatorial paths, so this parameter reduces the length of combinatorial paths through the crossbar.
62	
63	Some common configurations are given in the `xbar_latency_e` `enum`.  The recommended configuration (`CUT_ALL_AX`) is to have a latency of 2 on the AW and AR channels because these channels have the most combinatorial logic on them.  Additionally, `FallThrough` should be set to `0` to prevent logic on the AW channel from extending combinatorial paths on the W channel.  However, it is possible to run the crossbar in a fully combinatorial configuration by setting `LatencyMode` to `NO_LATENCY` and `FallThrough` to `1`.
64	
65	If two crossbars are connected in both directions, meaning both have one of their master ports connected to a slave port of the other, the `LatencyMode` of both crossbars must be set to either `CUT_SLV_PORTS`, `CUT_MST_PORTS`, or `CUT_ALL_PORTS`.  Any other latency mode will lead to timing loops on the uncut channels between the two crossbars.  The latency mode of the two crossbars does not have to be identical.
66	
67	
68	## Ports
69	
70	| Name                    | Description |
71	|:------------------------|:------------|
72	| `clk_i`                 | Clock to which all other signals (except `rst_ni`) are synchronous. |
73	| `rst_ni`                | Reset, asynchronous, active-low. |
74	| `test_i`                | Test mode enable (active-high). |
75	| `slv_ports_*`           | Array of slave ports of the crossbar.  The array index of each port is the index of the slave port.  This index will be prepended to all requests at one of the master ports. |
76	| `mst_ports_*`           | Array of master ports of the crossbar.  The array index of each port is the index of the master port. |
77	| `addr_map_i`            | Address map of the crossbar (see section *Address Map* above). |
78	| `en_default_mst_port_i` | One bit per slave port that defines whether the default master port is active for that slave port (see section *Decode Errors and Default Slave Port* above). |
79	| `default_mst_port_i`    | One master port index per slave port that defines the default master port for that slave port (if active). |
80	
81	
82	## Ordering and Stalls
83	
84	When one slave port receives two transactions with the same ID and direction (i.e., both read or both write) but targeting two different master ports, it will not accept the second transaction until the first has completed.  During this time, the crossbar stalls the AR or AW channel of that slave port.  To determine whether two transactions have the same ID, the `AxiIdUsedSlvPorts` least-significant bits are compared.  That parameter can be set to the full `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts` to avoid false ID conflicts, or it can be set to a lower value to reduce area and delay at the cost of more false conflicts.
85	
86	The reason for this ordering constraint is that AXI transactions with the same ID and direction must remain ordered.  If this crossbar would forward both transactions described above, the second master port could get a response before the first one, and the crossbar would have to reorder the responses before returning them on the master port.  However, for efficiency reasons, this crossbar does not have reorder buffers.
87	
88	
89	## Verification Methodology
90	
91	This module has been verified with a directed random verification testbench, described and implemented in `test/tb_axi_xbar.sv`.
92	
93	
94	## Design Rationale for No Pipelining Inside Crossbar
95	
96	Inserting spill registers between demuxers and muxers seems attractive to further reduce the length of combinatorial paths in the crossbar.  However, this can lead to deadlocks in the W channel where two different muxes at the master ports would circular wait on two different demuxes (TODO).  In fact, spill registers between the switching modules causes all four deadlock criteria to be met.  Recall that the criteria are:
97	
98	1. Mutual Exclusion
99	2. Hold and Wait
100	3. No Preemption
101	4. Circular Wait
102	
103	The first criterion is given by the nature of a multiplexer on the W channel: all W beats have to arrive in the same order as the AW beats regardless of the ID at the slave module.  Thus, the different master ports of the multiplexer exclude each other because the order is given by the arbitration tree of the AW channel.
104	
105	The second and third criterion are inherent to the AXI protocol:  For (2), the valid signal has to be held high until the ready signal goes high.  For (3), AXI does not allow interleaving of W beats and requires W bursts to be in the same order as AW beats.
106	
107	The fourth criterion is thus the only one that can be broken to prevent deadlocks.  However, inserting a spill register between a master port of the demultiplexer and a slave port of the multiplexer can lead to a circular dependency inside the W FIFOs.  This comes from the particular way the round robin arbiter from the AW channel in the multiplexer defines its priorities.  It is constructed in a way by giving each of its slave ports an increasing priority and then comparing pairwise down till a winner is chosen.  When the winner gets transferred, the priority state is advanced by one position, preventing starvation.
108	
109	The problem can be shown with an example.  Assume an arbitration tree with 10 inputs.  Two requests want to be served in the same clock cycle.  The one with the higher priority wins and the priority state advances.  In the next cycle again the same two inputs have a request waiting.  Again it is possible that the same port as last time wins as the priority shifted only one position further.  This can lead in conjunction with the other arbitration trees in the other muxes of the crossbar to the circular dependencies inside the FIFOs.  Removing the spill register between the demultiplexer and multiplexer forces the switching decision into the W FIFOs in the same clock cycle.  This leads to a strict ordering of the switching decision, thus preventing the circular wait.
110

file.content:
# AXI4+ATOP Fully-Connected Crossbar

`axi_xbar` is a fully-connected crossbar that implements the full AXI4 specification plus atomic operations (ATOPs) from AXI5.


## Design Overview

`axi_xbar` is a fully-connected crossbar, which means that each master module that is connected to a *slave port* for of the crossbar has direct wires to all slave modules that are connected to the *master ports* of the crossbar.
A block-diagram of the crossbar is shown below:

![Block-diagram showing the design of the full AXI4 Crossbar.](axi_xbar.png  "Block-diagram showing the design of the full AXI4 Crossbar.")

The crossbar has a configurable number of slave and master ports.

The ID width of the master ports is wider than that of the slave ports.  The additional ID bits are used by the internal multiplexers to route responses.  The ID width of the master ports must be `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts + $clog_2(NoSlvPorts)`.


## Address Map

One address map is shared by all master ports.  The *address map* contains an arbitrary number of rules (but at least one).  Each *rule* maps one address range to one master port.  Multiple rules can map to the same master port.  The address ranges of two rules may overlap: in case two address ranges overlap, the rule at the higher (more significant) position in the address map prevails.

Each address range includes the start address but does **not** include the end address.  That is, an address *matches* an address range if and only if
```
    addr >= start_addr && addr < end_addr
```
The start address must be less than or equal to the end address.

The address map can be defined and changed at run time (it is an input signal to the crossbar).  However, the address map must not be changed while any AW or AR channel of any slave port is valid.


## Decode Errors and Default Slave Port

Each slave port has its own internal *decode error slave* module.  If the address of a transaction does not match any rule, the transaction is routed to that decode error slave module.  That module absorbs each transaction and responds with a decode error (with the proper number of beats).  The data of each read response beat is `32'hBADCAB1E` (zero-extended or truncated to match the data width).

Each slave port can have a default master port.  If the default master port is enabled for a slave port, any address on that slave port that does not match any rule is routed to the default master port instead of the decode error slave.  The default master port can be enabled and changed at run time (it is an input signal to the crossbar), and the same restrictions as for the address map apply.


## Configuration

The crossbar is configured through the `Cfg` parameter with a `axi_pkg::xbar_cfg_t` struct.  That struct has the following fields:

| Name                 | Type               | Definition |
|:---------------------|:-------------------|:-----------|
| `NoSlvPorts`         | `int unsigned`     | The number of AXI slave ports of the crossbar (in other words, how many AXI master modules can be attached). |
| `NoMstPorts`         | `int unsigned`     | The number of AXI master ports of the crossbar (in other words, how many AXI slave modules can be attached). |
| `MaxMstTrans`        | `int unsigned`     | Each slave port can have at most this many transactions [in flight](../doc#in-flight). |
| `MaxSlvTrans`        | `int unsigned`     | Each master port can have at most this many transactions per ID [in flight](../doc#in-flight). |
| `FallThrough`        | `bit`              | Routing decisions on the AW channel fall through to the W channel.  Enabling this allows the crossbar to accept a W beat in the same cycle as the corresponding AW beat, but it increases the combinatorial path of the W channel with logic from the AW channel. |
| `LatencyMode`        | `enum logic [9:0]` | Latency on the individual channels, defined in detail in section *Pipelining and Latency* below. |
| `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts` | `int unsigned`     | The AXI ID width of the slave ports. |
| `AxiIdUsedSlvPorts`  | `int unsigned`     | The number of slave port ID bits (starting at the least significant) the crossbar uses to determine the uniqueness of an AXI ID (see section *Ordering and Stalls* below).  This value has to be less or equal than `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts`. |
| `UniqueIds`          | `bit`              | If you can guarantee that the ID of each transaction is always unique among all in-flight transactions in the same direction, setting this parameter to `1'b1` simplifies the crossbar.  See the [`axi_demux` documentation](axi_demux#ordering-and-stalls) for details. |
| `AxiAddrWidth`       | `int unsigned`     | The AXI address width. |
| `AxiDataWidth`       | `int unsigned`     | The AXI data width. |
| `NoAddrRules`        | `int unsigned`     | The number of address map rules. |

The other parameters are types to define the ports of the crossbar.  The `*_chan_t` and `*_req_t`/`*_resp_t` types must be bound in accordance to the configuration with the `AXI_TYPEDEF` macros defined in `axi/typedef.svh`.  The `rule_t` type must be bound to an address decoding rule with the same address width as in the configuration, and `axi_pkg` contains definitions for 64- and 32-bit addresses.

### Pipelining and Latency

The `LatencyMode` parameter allows to insert spill registers after each channel (AW, W, B, AR, and R) of each master port (i.e., each multiplexer) and before each channel of each slave port (i.e., each demultiplexer).  Spill registers cut combinatorial paths, so this parameter reduces the length of combinatorial paths through the crossbar.

Some common configurations are given in the `xbar_latency_e` `enum`.  The recommended configuration (`CUT_ALL_AX`) is to have a latency of 2 on the AW and AR channels because these channels have the most combinatorial logic on them.  Additionally, `FallThrough` should be set to `0` to prevent logic on the AW channel from extending combinatorial paths on the W channel.  However, it is possible to run the crossbar in a fully combinatorial configuration by setting `LatencyMode` to `NO_LATENCY` and `FallThrough` to `1`.

If two crossbars are connected in both directions, meaning both have one of their master ports connected to a slave port of the other, the `LatencyMode` of both crossbars must be set to either `CUT_SLV_PORTS`, `CUT_MST_PORTS`, or `CUT_ALL_PORTS`.  Any other latency mode will lead to timing loops on the uncut channels between the two crossbars.  The latency mode of the two crossbars does not have to be identical.


## Ports

| Name                    | Description |
|:------------------------|:------------|
| `clk_i`                 | Clock to which all other signals (except `rst_ni`) are synchronous. |
| `rst_ni`                | Reset, asynchronous, active-low. |
| `test_i`                | Test mode enable (active-high). |
| `slv_ports_*`           | Array of slave ports of the crossbar.  The array index of each port is the index of the slave port.  This index will be prepended to all requests at one of the master ports. |
| `mst_ports_*`           | Array of master ports of the crossbar.  The array index of each port is the index of the master port. |
| `addr_map_i`            | Address map of the crossbar (see section *Address Map* above). |
| `en_default_mst_port_i` | One bit per slave port that defines whether the default master port is active for that slave port (see section *Decode Errors and Default Slave Port* above). |
| `default_mst_port_i`    | One master port index per slave port that defines the default master port for that slave port (if active). |


## Ordering and Stalls

When one slave port receives two transactions with the same ID and direction (i.e., both read or both write) but targeting two different master ports, it will not accept the second transaction until the first has completed.  During this time, the crossbar stalls the AR or AW channel of that slave port.  To determine whether two transactions have the same ID, the `AxiIdUsedSlvPorts` least-significant bits are compared.  That parameter can be set to the full `AxiIdWidthSlvPorts` to avoid false ID conflicts, or it can be set to a lower value to reduce area and delay at the cost of more false conflicts.

The reason for this ordering constraint is that AXI transactions with the same ID and direction must remain ordered.  If this crossbar would forward both transactions described above, the second master port could get a response before the first one, and the crossbar would have to reorder the responses before returning them on the master port.  However, for efficiency reasons, this crossbar does not have reorder buffers.


## Verification Methodology

This module has been verified with a directed random verification testbench, described and implemented in `test/tb_axi_xbar.sv`.


## Design Rationale for No Pipelining Inside Crossbar

Inserting spill registers between demuxers and muxers seems attractive to further reduce the length of combinatorial paths in the crossbar.  However, this can lead to deadlocks in the W channel where two different muxes at the master ports would circular wait on two different demuxes (TODO).  In fact, spill registers between the switching modules causes all four deadlock criteria to be met.  Recall that the criteria are:

1. Mutual Exclusion
2. Hold and Wait
3. No Preemption
4. Circular Wait

The first criterion is given by the nature of a multiplexer on the W channel: all W beats have to arrive in the same order as the AW beats regardless of the ID at the slave module.  Thus, the different master ports of the multiplexer exclude each other because the order is given by the arbitration tree of the AW channel.

The second and third criterion are inherent to the AXI protocol:  For (2), the valid signal has to be held high until the ready signal goes high.  For (3), AXI does not allow interleaving of W beats and requires W bursts to be in the same order as AW beats.

The fourth criterion is thus the only one that can be broken to prevent deadlocks.  However, inserting a spill register between a master port of the demultiplexer and a slave port of the multiplexer can lead to a circular dependency inside the W FIFOs.  This comes from the particular way the round robin arbiter from the AW channel in the multiplexer defines its priorities.  It is constructed in a way by giving each of its slave ports an increasing priority and then comparing pairwise down till a winner is chosen.  When the winner gets transferred, the priority state is advanced by one position, preventing starvation.

The problem can be shown with an example.  Assume an arbitration tree with 10 inputs.  Two requests want to be served in the same clock cycle.  The one with the higher priority wins and the priority state advances.  In the next cycle again the same two inputs have a request waiting.  Again it is possible that the same port as last time wins as the priority shifted only one position further.  This can lead in conjunction with the other arbitration trees in the other muxes of the crossbar to the circular dependencies inside the FIFOs.  Removing the spill register between the demultiplexer and multiplexer forces the switching decision into the W FIFOs in the same clock cycle.  This leads to a strict ordering of the switching decision, thus preventing the circular wait.

#!/bin/bash
# Copyright (c) 2014-2018 ETH Zurich, University of Bologna
#
# Copyright and related rights are licensed under the Solderpad Hardware
# License, Version 0.51 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in
# compliance with the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
# http://solderpad.org/licenses/SHL-0.51. Unless required by applicable law
# or agreed to in writing, software, hardware and materials distributed under
# this License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR
# CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied. See the License for the
# specific language governing permissions and limitations under the License.
#
# Authors:
# - Fabian Schuiki <fschuiki@iis.ee.ethz.ch>
# - Andreas Kurth <akurth@iis.ee.ethz.ch>

set -e
ROOT=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)

[ ! -z "$SYNOPSYS_DC" ] || SYNOPSYS_DC="synopsys dc_shell -64"

echo 'remove_design -all' > ./synth.tcl
bender script synopsys -t synth_test >> ./synth.tcl
echo 'elaborate axi_synth_bench' >> ./synth.tcl

cat ./synth.tcl | $SYNOPSYS_DC | tee synth.log 2>&1
grep -i "warning:" synth.log || true
grep -i "error:" synth.log && false

touch synth.completed

content.content:
1	# AXI SystemVerilog Modules for High-Performance On-Chip Communication
2	[![CI status](https://github.com/pulp-platform/axi/actions/workflows/gitlab-ci.yml/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://github.com/pulp-platform/axi/actions/workflows/gitlab-ci.yml?query=branch%3Amaster)
3	[![GitHub tag (latest SemVer)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/tag/pulp-platform/axi?color=blue&label=current&sort=semver)](CHANGELOG.md)
4	[![SHL-0.51 license](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-SHL--0.51-green)](LICENSE)
5	
6	This repository provides modules to build on-chip communication networks adhering to the [AXI4 or AXI4-Lite standards][AMBA 5 Spec].  For high-performance communication, we implement AXI4[+ATOPs from AXI5](#atomic-operations).  For lightweight communication, we implement AXI4-Lite.  We aim to provide a complete end-to-end communication platform, including endpoints such as DMA engines and on-chip memory controllers.
7	
8	Our **design goals** are:
9	- **Topology Independence**: We provide elementary building blocks such as protocol [multiplexers](src/axi_mux.sv) and [demultiplexers](src/axi_demux.sv) that allow users to implement any network topology.  We also provide commonly used interconnecting components such as a [crossbar](src/axi_xbar.sv).
10	- **Modularity**: We favor design by composition over design by configuration where possible.  We strive to apply the *Unix philosophy* to hardware: make each module do one thing well.  This means you will more often instantiate our modules back-to-back than change a parameter value to build more specialized networks.
11	- **Fit for Heterogeneous Networks**: Our modules are parametrizable in terms of data width and transaction concurrency.  This allows to create optimized networks for a wide range of performance (e.g., bandwidth, concurrency, timing), power, and area requirements.  We provide modules such as [data width converters](src/axi_dw_converter.sv) and [ID width converters](src/axi_iw_converter.sv) that allow to join subnetworks with different properties, creating heterogeneous on-chip networks.
12	- **Full AXI Standard Compliance**.
13	- **Compatibility** with a [wide range of (recent versions of) EDA tools](#which-eda-tools-are-supported) and implementation in standardized synthesizable SystemVerilog.
14	
15	The **design and microarchitecture** of the modules in this repository is described in [**this paper**](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9522037) ([preprint](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2009.05334)).  If you use our work in your research, please cite it.
16	
17	
18	## List of Modules
19	
20	In addition to the documents linked in the following table, we are setting up [documentation auto-generated from inline docstrings](https://pulp-platform.github.io/axi/master).  (Replace `master` in that URL with a tag to get the documentation for a specific version.)
21	
22	| Name                                                        | Description                                                                                          | Doc                              |
23	|-------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------|
24	| [`axi_atop_filter`](src/axi_atop_filter.sv)                 | Filters atomic operations (ATOPs), i.e., write transactions that have a non-zero `aw_atop` value.    |                                  |
25	| [`axi_burst_splitter`](src/axi_burst_splitter.sv)           | Split AXI4 burst transfers into single-beat transactions.                                            |                                  |
26	| [`axi_burst_splitter_gran`](src/axi_burst_splitter_gran.sv) | Split AXI4 burst transfers into transactions of runtime-configurable granularity.                    |                                  |
27	| [`axi_burst_unwrap`](src/axi_burst_unwrap.sv)               | Convert AXI4 wrapping burst transfers into up to two incremental bursts.                             |                                  |
28	| [`axi_cdc`](src/axi_cdc.sv)                                 | AXI clock domain crossing based on a Gray FIFO implementation.                                       |                                  |
29	| [`axi_cut`](src/axi_cut.sv)                                 | Breaks all combinatorial paths between its input and output.                                         |                                  |
30	| [`axi_delayer`](src/axi_delayer.sv)                         | Synthesizable module which can (randomly) delays AXI channels.                                       |                                  |
31	| [`axi_demux_simple`](src/axi_demux_simple.sv)               | Demux without spill registers.                                                                       | [Doc](doc/axi_demux.md)          |
32	| [`axi_demux`](src/axi_demux.sv)                             | Demultiplexes an AXI bus from one slave port to multiple master ports.                               | [Doc](doc/axi_demux.md)          |
33	| [`axi_demux_id_counters`](src/axi_demux_id_counters.sv)     | ID counters used by `axi_demux` to track outstanding transactions.                                   |                                  |
34	| [`axi_dw_converter`](src/axi_dw_converter.sv)               | A data width converter between AXI interfaces of any data width.                                     |                                  |
35	| [`axi_dw_downsizer`](src/axi_dw_downsizer.sv)               | A data width converter between a wide AXI master and a narrower AXI slave.                           |                                  |
36	| [`axi_dw_upsizer`](src/axi_dw_upsizer.sv)                   | A data width converter between a narrow AXI master and a wider AXI slave.                            |                                  |
37	| [`axi_err_slv`](src/axi_err_slv.sv)                         | Always responds with an AXI decode/slave error for transactions which are sent to it.                |                                  |
38	| [`axi_fifo`](src/axi_fifo.sv)                               | A Fifo for each AXI4 channel to buffer requests.                                                     |                                  |
39	| [`axi_from_mem`](src/axi_from_mem.sv)                       | This module acts like an SRAM and makes AXI4 requests downstream.                                    |                                  |
40	| [`axi_id_prepend`](src/axi_id_prepend.sv)                   | This module prepends/strips the MSB from the AXI IDs.                                                |                                  |

63	| [`axi_mux`](src/axi_mux.sv)                                 | Multiplexes the AXI4 slave ports down to one master port.                                            | [Doc](doc/axi_mux.md)            |
64	| [`axi_pkg`](src/axi_pkg.sv)                                 | Contains AXI definitions, common structs, and useful helper functions.                               |                                  |

70	| [`axi_to_axi_lite`](src/axi_to_axi_lite.sv)                 | AXI4 to AXI4-Lite protocol converter.                                                                |                                  |

76	
77	## Synthesizable Verification Modules
78	
79	The following modules are meant to be used for verification purposes only but are synthesizable to be used in FPGA environments.
80	
81	| Name                                                 | Description                                                                                             |
82	|------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
83	| [`axi_bus_compare`](src/axi_bus_compare.sv)          | Compares two buses of the same type (and in the same clock domain), returns events on mismatch.         |
84	| [`axi_fifo_delay_dyn`](src/axi_fifo_delay_dyn.sv)    | Delay and buffer each channel of an AXI bus individually.                                               |
85	| [`axi_slave_compare`](src/axi_slave_compare.sv)      | Compares two slave devices of the same type (and in the same clock domain), returns events on mismatch. |
86	
87	
88	### Simulation-Only Modules
89	
90	In addition to the modules above, which are available in synthesis and simulation, the following modules are available only in simulation.  Those modules are widely used in our testbenches, but they are also suitable to build testbenches for AXI modules and systems outside this repository.
91	
92	| Name                                                 | Description                                                                                            |
93	|------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
94	| [`axi_chan_compare`](src/axi_chan_compare.sv)        | Non-synthesizable module comparing two AXI channels of the same type                                   |
95	| [`axi_chan_logger`](src/axi_test.sv)                 | Logs the transactions of an AXI4(+ATOPs) port to files.                                                |
96	| [`axi_driver`](src/axi_test.sv)                      | Low-level driver for AXI4(+ATOPs) that can send and receive individual beats on any channel.           |
97	| [`axi_dumper`](src/axi_dumper.sv)                    | Dumps log to file to be interpreted by `axi_dumper_interpret` script for debugging purposes.           |
98	| [`axi_file_master`](src/axi_test.sv)                 | AXI4 master for file-based testbenches                                                                 |
99	| [`axi_lite_driver`](src/axi_test.sv)                 | Low-level driver for AXI4-Lite that can send and receive individual beats on any channel.              |
100	| [`axi_lite_rand_master`](src/axi_test.sv)            | AXI4-Lite master component that issues random transactions within user-defined constraints.            |
101	| [`axi_lite_rand_slave`](src/axi_test.sv)             | AXI4-Lite slave component that responds to transactions with constrainable random delays and data.     |
102	| [`axi_rand_master`](src/axi_test.sv)                 | AXI4(+ATOPs) master component that issues random transactions within user-defined constraints.         |
103	| [`axi_rand_slave`](src/axi_test.sv)                  | AXI4(+ATOPs) slave component that responds to transactions with constrainable random delays and data.  |
104	| [`axi_scoreboard`](src/axi_test.sv)                  | Scoreboard that models a memory that only gets changed by the monitored AXI4(+ATOPs) port.             |
105	| [`axi_sim_mem`](src/axi_sim_mem.sv)                  | Infinite memory with AXI4 slave port.                                                                  |
106	
107	
108	
109	## Atomic Operations
110	
111	AXI4+ATOPs means the full AXI4 specification plus atomic operations (ATOPs) as defined in Section E1.1 of the [AMBA 5 specification][AMBA 5 Spec]. This has the following implications for modules that do not implement ATOPs and systems that include such modules:
112	
113	- Masters that do not issue ATOPs must set `aw_atop` to `'0`.
114	- Slaves that do not support ATOPs must specify this in their interface documentation and can ignore the `aw_atop` signal.
115	- System designers are responsible for ensuring that
116	  1. slaves that do not support ATOPs are behind an [`axi_atop_filter`](src/axi_atop_filter.sv) if any master could issue an ATOP to such slaves and
117	  2. the `aw_atop` signal is well-defined at the input of any (non-AXI4-Lite) module in this repository.
118	
119	Masters and slaves that do support ATOPs must adhere to Section E1.1 of the [AMBA 5 specification][AMBA 5 Spec].  In particular:
120	- ATOPs that have the `aw_atop[axi_pkg::ATOP_R_RESP]` bit set generate a write response (B channel) beat and at least one read response (R channel) beat.  All modules for which the `aw_atop[axi_pkg::ATOP_R_RESP]` bit could be set at their master port must be able to handle both B and R beats (in any order and without requiring a simultaneous handshake) for each such ATOP request.  All modules for which the `aw_atop[axi_pkg::ATOP_R_RESP]` bit could be set at their slave port must respond with the appropriate number of B and R beats for each such ATOP request.
121	- ATOPs must not use the same AXI ID as any other transaction that is outstanding at the same time.
122	
123	
124	## Which EDA Tools Are Supported?
125	
126	Our code is written in standard SystemVerilog ([IEEE 1800-2012][], to be precise), so the more important question is: Which subset of SystemVerilog does your EDA tool support?
127	
128	We aim to be compatible with a wide range of EDA tools.  For this reason, we strive to use as simple language constructs as possible, especially for our synthesizable modules.  We encourage contributions that further simplify our code to make it compatible with even more EDA tools.  We also welcome contributions that work around problems that specific EDA tools may have with our code, as long as:
129	- the EDA tool is reasonably widely used,
130	- recent versions of the EDA tool are affected,
131	- the workaround does not break functionality in other tools, and
132	- the workaround does not significantly complicate code or add maintenance overhead.
133	
134	In addition, we suggest to report issues with the SystemVerilog language support directly to the EDA vendor. Our code is fully open and
135	can / should be shared with the EDA vendor as a testcase for any language problem encountered.
136	
137	All code in each release and on the default branch is tested on a recent version of at least one industry-standard RTL simulator and synthesizer.  You can examine the [CI settings](./.gitlab-ci.yml) to find out which version of which tool we are running.
138	
139	
140	[AMBA 5 Spec]: https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ihi0022/hc
141	[IEEE 1800-2012]: https://standards.ieee.org/standard/1800-2012.html
142	[doc.axi_id_remap]: https://pulp-platform.github.io/axi/master/module.axi_id_remap
143	[doc.axi_id_serialize]: https://pulp-platform.github.io/axi/master/module.axi_id_serialize
144	[doc.axi_iw_converter]: https://pulp-platform.github.io/axi/master/module.axi_iw_converter
145	[doc.axi_lite_regs]: https://pulp-platform.github.io/axi/master/module.axi_lite_regs
146
